name: code_structure
description: List functions, structs, classes, interfaces, traits, enums in source files or extract Python function/class source code via inspect.getsource().

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more source file paths

parameters.name: --context=N
parameters.description: Show N lines after each definition (like grep -A N); auto-enables --summary

parameters.name: -A N
parameters.description: Same as --context=N; show N lines after each definition

parameters.name: --py-inspect
parameters.description: Use Python inspect.getsource() to extract accurate function/class source; optionally filter by name

parameters.name: --cd=DIR
parameters.description: Change to DIR before processing (for correct Python imports in --py-inspect mode)

examples.expected: Full source code of the four functions extracted by Python inspect.getsource()

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multiple grep/cat/head calls to inspect code structure with a single step; --context=N eliminates grep -A N + head pipelines for reading class/function bodies, saving 1-2 steps per lookup; --py-inspect replaces cd + python3 -c + inspect.getsource() multi-step pattern seen in samples, collapsing N separate bash calls into one step.
